rationale: Hard pass: a Dragon Ball Z Goku hook is IP-infringing creative that exposes Block Blast to takedowns and platform policy strikes — non-starter regardless of fit. Beyond legal risk, the shōnen-anime power-fantasy hook targets a young male anime/RPG audience that has near-zero overlap with the 25-55 casual block-puzzle player, and the explosive combat visual contradicts the calm/satisfying UI mood and clean abstract aesthetic. Only the gold accent (#FFD700) palette overlaps; do not greenlight, and flag the single advertiser source as likely a misclassified or rogue creative.
